home.tagline: Built for groups who have no idea what or where to eat — and just want an answer.
home.recovery_hint: Set a password to rejoin later (Recover → invite code + room name + this password). Store it safely — we cannot reset it.
home.retention_warning: Groups with no roulette spin for 7 days (or never spun after 7 days) may be deleted automatically to save space.
home.recover_link: Lost your room link? Recover with invite + password
home.auto_redirect: If you were already in a group on this device, you'll be sent to the room automatically.
home.err_your_name: Enter your name so the group knows who started it.
home.err_recovery: Set a member password (at least 4 characters).
home.err_name_taken: That name is already taken in this group. Choose another name.
home.err_env: Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env.local, then restart npm run dev.
home.err_no_group: No group with that invite code.
home.err_room_locked: This room is locked — the owner is not accepting new members right now.

recover.title: Rejoin your room
recover.subtitle: Enter the invite code and the recovery password you set when you created the group.
recover.member_subtitle: Use the invite code, your display name in this room, and your member password. This works for members and creators.
recover.err_member_name: Enter the name you use in this room.

group.recovery_banner: Bookmark this page or save the invite code and group name. This browser remembers the room on this device. On a new device, join from Home with the code, or use Recover (invite code + room name + member password).
group.settings_intro_member: Set a member password so you can rejoin from another device (Home → Recover → Member).
group.settings_intro_creator: Set a member password for recovery. As creator, you can also change the invite code and lock the room below.
group.places_empty: Nothing here yet — use the Add place tab.
group.add_hint: Google Maps or Tabelog links work well. You can only add spots after joining with your name.
group.add_hint_google_only: Paste a Google Maps link only (full map embed works with Google). Short links like goo.gl/maps are OK.
group.add_name_auto_hint: The name is taken from the link when possible (place page, search, or coordinates).
group.err_google_maps_only: Use a Google Maps URL only — e.g. maps.google.com, google.com/maps, maps.app.goo.gl, or goo.gl maps links.
group.members_help_creator: As creator, you can remove others and transfer creator role to a trusted member. To leave yourself, use Leave group (top), or delete the whole group below.
group.members_help_other: Only the group creator can remove members or delete the group. If creator is missing, any member can claim creator role.
group.confirm_transfer_creator: Transfer creator role to this member?
group.no_creator_hint: This group currently has no active creator. A member can claim creator role to manage room settings.
group.delete_group_hint: Permanently removes this group, every member, place, and roulette history. Others on this page will be sent home.
group.join_hint: You need a name in this room before you can add places or vote.
group.join_tip: Tip: save the invite code above — you can rejoin from another device with it.
group.not_loaded: This group could not be loaded.
group.kicked: You were removed from this group.
group.session_moved: You signed in on another device. This device has been signed out of the room.
group.err_url_invalid: That doesn't look like a valid URL.
group.err_url_scheme: Use an http or https link.
group.place_duplicate: That link is already in the list.
group.place_duplicate_name: That place name is already in the list.
group.confirm_remove_place: Remove this place from the group list?
group.err_remove_place_policy: Could not delete — Supabase needs a DELETE policy on `locations`. Run the two SQL lines in supabase/migrations/20250327000000_locations_delete_policy.sql (Dashboard → SQL Editor).
group.err_remove_place_forbidden: Only the room owner can remove places.
group.invite_updated: Invite code updated. Share the new code with your group.
group.confirm_remove: Remove this person from the group? They will lose access until they rejoin.
group.confirm_delete_group: Delete this group for everyone? All places, spins, and members will be gone.
group.prompt_delete: Type DELETE in capitals to confirm.
group.cancel_delete: Cancelled — type DELETE exactly to confirm.
group.places_empty_tab: Nothing here yet — use the {tabName} tab.
group.err_name_taken: That name is already taken in this room. Choose another name.
group.room_locked: This room is locked — new members cannot join until the owner unlocks it.
group.room_locked_hint: The owner has locked the room. People already here are unaffected. Ask the owner to unlock, or use Member recovery if you set a member password.
group.join_locked_help: When locked, new browsers/devices cannot join until you unlock. Existing members stay in.
group.member_password_hint: Set a password to rejoin from another device: Home → Recover → Member, with invite code + your name + this password.
group.member_password_badge: Member password is set — you can use Recover → Member on another device.
group.member_password_remember_stored: If you lose this tab, use Home → Recover → Member with invite code, your name, and this password.
group.member_password_remember_warn: We only store a secure hash — we cannot show this password again or reset it. Save it in a password manager or somewhere safe.
group.member_password_change_hint: Enter a new password twice. Your current password is never shown.

roulette.sync_hint: Everyone sees the same spin in real time (synced to the server clock).
roulette.vote_hint: When more than half the group votes, a new spin starts for everyone.
roulette.add_places_first: Add places in the {tabName} tab first.
roulette.add_one_first: Add at least one place first.
